_meta.description: Educational background history structured identically to work experience. Each entry represents a single degree/program.

fields.name: Institution name
fields.desc: Array of achievements, coursework, and highlights

educations.name: Trinity College Dublin
desc: Relevant Coursework: Information Retrieval and Search Optimisation, Adaptive Applications, Software Engineering
Completed my research project on Gesture Recognition based Smart Device control using Google's Mediapipe and an LSTM Neural Network
Secured a spot among the top 10 graduates from Gradireland's Graduate of the Year 2023-24 event.

educations.name: Trinity College Dublin
desc: Relevant Coursework: Computer Networks, Internet Applications, Database Management Systems, Project Management, Deep Learning, Microprocessor Systems, Probability and Statistics
Completed an 8-month software engineering internship at General Motors, Dublin, Ireland.
Secured a 15% scholarship for my future Masters' degree at Trinity.

educations.name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology
desc: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Discrete Mathematical Structures, Engineering Design Project

Identified as the top 1% of the students given the chance to be a part of the International Engineering Program (IEP) to complete their last two years of the Bachelor's degree at Trinity College Dublin
Awarded the title of Game of Codes 2019 Champion, an event organised by the OWASP Thapar community which saw 200+ developers competing for the top rank.

educations.name: Sheiling House School
desc: Relevant Coursework: Computer Science, Object Oriented Programming with Java
Achieved a spot among the top 6% students nationwide for the Joint Entrance Exam (JEE) Mains given by more than 11 lakh students in India.
Senior mentor in the Sheiling House Computer Club. Spearheaded various events for the annual Teknovation fest for two consecutive years.
